summary: Tested new Trading Dashboard page (Option D design) and verified all components render correctly. Backend APIs work (7/7 passed), UI renders all expected components (Open Positions, SPY Chart, Order Pipeline, In-Trade Guidance, Today's Performance, Risk Status). Navigation works, TradingBotPanel removed from sidebar.

trading_dashboard_navigation.details: Sidebar shows 'Trading Dashboard' nav item with data-testid='nav-trading', navigates to /trading route

trading_dashboard_page_render.details: TradingDashboardPage.jsx renders with title 'Trading Dashboard' and all components

open_positions_component.details: Shows '0 active' positions, displays 'No open positions' when empty

spy_chart_tradingview.details: TradingView chart loads with SPY symbol (SPDR S&P 500 ETF TRUST), shows current price $677.05

order_pipeline_component.details: Shows Pending (0), Executing (0), Filled (0) counters with OFFLINE badge when IB disconnected

in_trade_guidance_component.details: Shows 'No active guidance - positions look healthy' when no positions

todays_performance_component.details: Shows Trades, Win Rate, Winners, Losers, Realized P&L, Unrealized P&L

risk_status_component.details: Shows Daily Loss Limit (0% used), Position Exposure (0 positions)

api_order_queue_status.details: Returns success, pending_count, executing_count, completed_count, pusher_active

api_trading_bot_status.details: Returns success, running, mode, risk_params, daily_stats, strategy_configs

api_ib_pushed_data.details: Returns connected, quotes, positions, account, level2 data structure

trading_bot_panel_removed.details: TradingBotPanel not rendered in RightSidebar.jsx (functionality consolidated in Trading Dashboard)

command_center_works.details: Command Center page still renders correctly with AI Trading Assistant, Portfolio Insights, Market Intel, Scanner Alerts

critical_code_review_comments: TradingView chart correctly uses AMEX:SPY exchange prefix (fixed from previous NASDAQ:SPY issue)
API endpoints return proper data structures with success flags
IB Status correctly shows 'Offline' when IB Gateway not connected (expected for test environment)
All UI components have proper fallback states when no data available
test_credentials: N/A - IB Gateway not connected in test environment
seed_data_creation: None - tested with live API responses
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trading Dashboard (Option D) fully implemented and working. All UI components render correctly. TradingBotPanel functionality moved from RightSidebar to dedicated Trading Dashboard page. IB Gateway status shows 'Offline' in test environment (expected). APIs return proper data structures.
